case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. DANIEL HEKKEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-13-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY WAH-MEI LEW. DEFENDANT DANILE HEKKEL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY WAH-MEI LEW, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT DANIEL HEKKEL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEKKEL, DANIEL $3,630.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,675.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HEKKEL, DANIEL HEARING SET FOR DEC-21-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DANIEL HEKKEL ON DEC-21-2017 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY WAH-MEI LEW, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT DANIEL HEKKEL.
